company_context: AI Revenue Platform for Sales Teams | People.ai Impatience is also a virtue Ask a question. Get an answer. No spreadsheets, no guessing, no waiting. See how it works Book a demo Driving trillions in pipeline and revenue for the world’s top sales teams Meet Our Customers Sound familiar? You've bought every tool CRM. Conversation intelligence. Sales engagement. BI dashboards. Hundreds of thousands of activities every week, scattered across a dozen platforms. Still can't see what matters Because nothing connects. Activity lives in silos. When your CEO asks "Will we hit the quarter?" you're building spreadsheets. Here's what you really want to know "Will we hit our number this quarter?" Real-time forecast accuracy based on deal velocity, executive engagement, and historical patterns. Know which deals will close and which need intervention. "Which deals are at risk and why? Know if a deal went quiet, lost its internal advocate, or never built real relationships. See the warning signs and what to do about them. "Where should my team focus this month?" See where coverage is weak, which territories aren't generating enough pipeline, and which buying signals your team is missing. One platform. Every answer. 1 Capture everything Emails, calls, meetings — all captured automatically from the tools your team already uses. No data entry. 2 Connect it to revenue Identify risks early, including: opportunities losing steam, missing stakeholders, or weak engagement. 3 Get your answers Answers, not dashboards. Know if your forecast is real, where your pipeline is weak, and what deserves attention. Thousands of businesses have already seen transformational results Join the other sales teams who have complete, accurate data for every deal. With People.ai, we’ve removed the guesswork from our sales process and set our sellers up for success. Read More Esther Friend Former VP of Sales Efficiency and Transformation There are many sales methodologies, and no one is necessarily better than another. What really matters is high adoption, enforceability, and CRM compliance. People.ai is fully integrated with our CRM and took just a few clicks to set up. This made it incredibly appealing and lets us guarantee high usage of our chosen process. Read More Spencer Hodson Vice President of Global Sales Operations and Development People.ai makes the data that we are collecting more meaningful. When you come into a new leadership role, you wonder if you can trust the data that existed before you joined. Because of People.ai, I know I can trust the data and confidently run my sales org off of it. Read More Julian Dimery Sr. Director of Sales Every customer-facing activity happening in our sales org is captured in Salesforce, the contact is created, and it gets associated with the right opportunity—with no extra effort from our sales team. Read More Clark Green VP, Global Revenue Operations This new forecasting solution gives us a crystal-clear view of our pipeline and puts actionable

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Hi, my name is Alex, and I'm reaching out from DeepData AI. We're a data processing solution that helps sales teams like yours make more informed decisions. I came across your company and was impressed with the work you're doing. Can I take a minute to introduce our platform and see if it might be a good fit for you?

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Ah, yes, I'm John, the CTO. I'm always interested in exploring new technologies, but I have to say, we've already invested heavily in a number of sales tools. What makes DeepData AI different from what we're already using?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: That's a great question, John. Our platform uses AI to integrate and analyze data from all your existing sales tools, providing real-time insights and predictions. This helps your team identify potential roadblocks and opportunities, allowing you to make more accurate forecasts and optimize your sales strategy.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I see. That sounds interesting, but I have to be honest, our budget for new tools is pretty tight right now. We've already spent a significant amount on our current CRM and sales engagement platforms. How does your pricing compare to what we're already paying?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Our pricing is competitive with other solutions on the market, and we offer a tiered pricing model to fit different company sizes and needs. I can send over some more detailed information on our pricing if you'd like.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate that, but to be honest, we're not really looking to add any new tools to our stack right now. We're in the middle of a major integration project with our existing systems, and I don't want to add any more complexity to the mix. Maybe this is something we can revisit in a few months?

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: I completely understand, John. Integration can be a challenge. However, our platform is designed to be highly adaptable and can integrate with a wide range of existing systems. We've had success with other companies in similar situations, and I think we could really help you optimize your sales process.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: I appreciate the offer, Alex, but like I said, we're just not in a position to take on any new projects or tools right now. Why don't you send me an email with some more information, and I'll take a look at it when I have a chance? I'm afraid that's all I can commit to for now.

conversation.speaker: Seller
conversation.message: Absolutely, John. I'll send over that information right away. Thank you for considering DeepData AI, and I hope we can reconnect in the future.

conversation.speaker: Buyer
conversation.message: Thank you, Alex. I appreciate your understanding, and I wish you the best of luck with your product. However, I think we're going to have to pass on this one for now.

analysis.raw:
Score: 4
Outcome: Failure
Key_Objection: Timing
Feedback: The seller should have more aggressively addressed the buyer's timing concerns and explored potential flexible implementation options to overcome the objection. Sentiment: Neutral
